caption: In an indoor setting, a woman with short brown hair, wearing a white t-shirt and a black blazer, gives a presentation. She stands in front of a projection screen, holding a tablet and gesturing with her hand as she speaks. Facing her is a person wearing a yellow jacket and a green beanie, seen from the back. Two black chairs are positioned against the wall to the right. In the initial sequence, the projection screen displays a classical painting of a reclining nude figure with the text "data as a reflection" in the upper right corner. As the scene progresses, the projected image shifts to a colorful, abstract, and distorted composition. The text on the screen changes to "a as a self p", though some letters are obscured by the speaker's body and the tablet. The speaker's position and gestures remain relatively consistent throughout the sequence.
